description: Material delete counts invoice lines only through active parent invoices, not raw invoice_lines rows
detail: Soft-deleted/cancelled invoices must not keep blocking item archive/delete

description: Cancelled production orders and their consumption/output rows do not block material delete
detail: Production detail rows must be joined to non-cancelled orders

description: Inventory movements tied to deleted invoices/cancelled production orders are not counted as active blockers
detail: Movement blockers must follow active source documents instead of raw movement counts

description: Return lines and return movements count only active, non-deleted return documents
detail: Deleted/cancelled returns should not block item archive/delete

description: Active BOM recipe references remain blockers even when production orders are cancelled
detail: BOM is master data and must be removed/edited explicitly

description: Delete item error uses Arabic user-facing labels instead of raw table names like invoice_line/bom_line
detail: The delete_item message must not leak raw database table names
